params_frozen.design_provenance: v4 in-class extension of event_drift_search_2026_05_03 after v3 (event_drift_v3_pead_quality_clean) ABANDONED 2026-05-03 at Phase 2 breadth audit on R2000-PIT (mean breadth 3.84/day vs gate >=10; retry sue_quartile+no-Day-1 9.80/day still <gate). Root cause: 71.9% Sloan accruals data attrition (7163 of 9967) on R2000 small-caps from sparse US-GAAP tagging (LongTermDebtCurrent, IncomeTaxesPayable, DepreciationAndAmortization). v3 postmortem (docs/research/event_drift_v3_breadth_audit_2026_05_03.md L121-125) explicitly identified S&P 1500 + Russell Top 1000 as pre-committed pivot universe for any future PEAD-class experiment. v4 executes that contingency with universe-only change; all other params unchanged from v3.
params_frozen.adversarial_review: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro (high effort, 2026-05-03): ranked v4 dense-universe PEAD #1 by ex-ante info-value-per-Bonferroni-cost vs alternatives (iVolatility v10 sunk-cost trap on 2026-05-08 deadline; alt-data v2 holdout Lasso-zero collapse predicted). Cited Mclean post-2021 PEAD decay ~40-50% in mid-cap; Engelberg-Sasseville-Williams 2021 baseline +2.0-2.5 alpha-t. Honest expected ceiling +1.8 mean alpha-t. Zen gemini-3-pro-preview (high thinking, 2026-05-03): AGREE v4 pivot grounded; AGREE rejection of GAAP-tag-cascading on R2000 (HARKing-on-data-engineering risk); DISSENT on universe (recommended S&P 600 small-cap-only, citing S&P 500 PEAD largely arbitraged away). User elected S&P 1500 over zen S&P 600 recommendation 2026-05-03 for safer breadth (~22/day expected vs ~8/day) accepting lower alpha-t ceiling. Contingency: if v4 produces breadth PASS but mid-strength signal (alpha-t 1.0-1.8), v5 candidate is S&P 600 isolated to validate dilution hypothesis.
params_frozen.accrual_formula: (delta_AssetsCurrent - delta_CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue) - (delta_LiabilitiesCurrent - delta_LongTermDebtCurrent - delta_IncomeTaxesPayable) - DepreciationAndAmortization, scaled by avg(Assets_t, Assets_{t-1})
params_frozen.day1_definition: ret_d1 = close_{d1} / close_{d-1} - 1, gate keeps sign(ret_d1) == sign(SUE)
params_frozen.t0_after_hours_rule: if 8K_2.02 filed_time >= 16:00 ET then announce_day := next_trading_day; entry = announce_day + 2 (regular open d+2). Eliminates intraday lookahead.
params_frozen.overlapping_window_policy: single_active_window_per_ticker. New SUE while existing window active is dropped (NOT a new window). Hard-reset on natural expiry at d+60.
params_frozen.universe: sp1500_pit (S&P 500 + S&P 400 mid + S&P 600 small), ADV>=5M_USD over 60d, EX Financials (GICS 40) and Utilities (GICS 55). Optionable filter NOT required (event-driven fundamental signal, no options data dependency). CHANGED FROM v3: was edgar_companyfacts_covered (R2000-PIT 1612 small-caps).
params_frozen.universe_pit_source: alphalens/data/universes/sp1500_pit.py (TO BE CREATED Phase 1; PIT membership SoT with S&P committee revision history)
params_frozen.sector_classification_source: SIC code from companyfacts -> GICS mapping table
params_frozen.delisting_handling: Standard -50% delisting / -100% bankruptcy at terminal bar (parity with v3, v7-v9). Open windows on delisted tickers terminate at delisting bar with realized return to that point + delisting markdown.
params_frozen.benchmark: MDY (mid-cap proxy, parity with v3, v7-v9 to neutralize mega-cap drag)

periods.rationale: Same burnt holdout as v3 + v7/v8/v9 (2024-04-30..2026-04-30). Window-shopping = HARKing. Burnt-holdout multiplicity escalation absorbed via threshold |t|>=3.50 (above naive Bonferroni n=20 of 3.34). Train extended back to 2018-01-01 to capture post-companyfacts-availability era. Identical period framing to v3 ensures universe is the only varying axis.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (long-only-PEAD-quality-portfolio - MDY-return) holdout series. 5-phase robust mean.
success_criteria.primary_pass_rule: Holdout multi-phase mean(alpha_t) >= 3.50 AND alpha_t_range across 5 phases <= 0.5 AND every-phase alpha_t >= 0.5 AND mean daily breadth >= 10 across all phases AND p10 daily breadth >= 5 AND Day-1-sign confirmation gate fires for >=40% of top-quintile candidates.
auto_pivot_triggers: mean daily breadth < 10 in Phase 2 audit -> ABORT pre-holdout-run; ONE retry permitted (sue_quartile OR no-Day-1, single-axis); if still <10 close class
p10 daily breadth < 5 in Phase 2 audit -> same as mean<10 trigger
Day-1 sign confirmation gate retains <30% candidates -> diagnostic regime-shift flag
breadth PASS + holdout alpha_t in [1.0, 1.8] -> register diagnostic 'PEAD lives, S&P 500 dilutes per zen prediction'; v5 candidate = repeat on S&P 600-only

fail_classification.fundamental_compression: all phases consistently weak (max alpha_t < 1.5) -> PEAD compressed in dense-universe regime; class likely closes after this single test
fail_classification.phase_fragility: high dispersion alpha_t_range > 0.5 -> base signal exists but unstable; consider revising trim or accruals def
fail_classification.breadth_collapse: mean daily < 10 OR p10 < 5 -> retry once with sue_quartile OR no-Day-1 gate (single axis only); if still <10 close class (consistent with v3 closure mechanism applied to v4 universe pivot)
fail_classification.dilution_diagnostic: breadth PASS + alpha_t in [1.0, 1.8] across phases with low dispersion -> S&P 500 dilution hypothesis confirmed; v5 = S&P 600 isolated

success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
success_criteria.rationale: Threshold |t|>=3.50 escalated above naive Bonferroni n=20 of 3.34 to absorb meta-multiplicity of 20-th-class reuse of the same 2024-04-30..2026-04-30 holdout with implicit cross-class learning from prior 19 fails. Universe-pivot in v4 was pre-committed in v3 postmortem (NOT post-hoc cherry-pick) so no additional cross-universe selection multiplicity is added. Honest hurdle for capital deployment given the dependent-tests context.
